import pytest
from your_module import is_valid_email  # Replace your_module

class TestIsValidEmail:

    def test_valid_email(self):
        assert is_valid_email("test@example.com") == True
        assert is_valid_email("john.doe@subdomain.example.co.uk") == True
        assert is_valid_email("jane_doe123@example.net") == True
        assert is_valid_email("user+alias@example.org") == True
        assert is_valid_email("very.long.email.address@very.long.subdomain.example.museum") == True
        assert is_valid_email("a@b.co") == True
        assert is_valid_email("a.b@c.com") == True
        assert is_valid_email("a-b@c.com") == True
        assert is_valid_email("a_b@c.com") == True
        assert is_valid_email("a123@c.com") == True
        assert is_valid_email("a%b@c.com") == True

    def test_invalid_email(self):
        assert is_valid_email("invalid-email") == False
        assert is_valid_email("invalid.email") == False
        assert is_valid_email("invalid@email") == False
        assert is_valid_email("invalid@email.") == False
